vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-compliant with the visual evidence. The desk environment shows significant degradation and lack of visible plant matter corresponding to the expected P1-P4 specimens.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No visible String of Nickels.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No visible Mexican Mint.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: Pothos absent; White Rabbit anchor is present but isolated.

plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains only the White Rabbit anchor; no Pothos foliage detected.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and undisturbed across all pots.
biome_observations.surface_debris: A metal spoon is present in the T-2 image, indicating human intervention/tool usage. No fungal growth or incidental sprouts observed.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_T-3: Initial state shows empty pots with a small sprout/debris in P3.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Introduction of a metal spoon into the P1/P2 area.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Removal of the spoon; continued absence of biological growth.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_current: Static state; no recovery or new growth.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. No active photosynthesis or plant structures are present. The environment is essentially a collection of empty containers.
anomalies: Persistent absence of all registered botanical specimens.
White Rabbit anchor is the only non-soil object remaining.
vision_report.narrative_description: As an expert ethologist, I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots are devoid of the expected flora. The only notable event in the timeline was the temporary placement of a metal spoon, which suggests human interaction but no horticultural maintenance. The biome is currently dormant or abandoned.
